features: This Rexona women's deodorant is sold in a pack of 6x200ml. Antibacterial
The REXONA Invisible Pure women's antiperspirant spray is effective against sweat and bad odours, to make you feel good all day long
A yellow and white anti-fingerprint formula
Effective 48 hours against sweat and bad odours. Keep moving – from sunrise to sunset!
Active formula enhanced by Motionsense technology - the more you move, the more protected you are
A fresh scent to make you feel good all day long
description: Directions In order for your deodorant to be effective, follow this essential application guide. First, shake the spray to mix its ingredients correctly. Then, do a brief and strong spray of product on each of your armpits about 15 cm apart. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin.
